legacy.content:
# Phase 35-01 Plan: Multi-space explorer controls
## Objective
Improve Space Explorer interaction for pack authoring and feature-combination testing.
## Tasks
1. Add feature filters driven by `featureSchema.spaces`. 2. Add presets for common feature combinations and deltas. 3. Add side-by-side baseline vs candidate comparison mode. 4. Add export of selected feature configuration as pack-ready JSON patch.
## Verification
- Explorer can switch spaces and apply feature subsets without errors. - Export payload can be merged into `space-vectors.json`.
